factors.rationale: The phone cases are visible but compete with other elements in the image.
The cases are shown being held, indicating a clear use case.
The image suggests positive attributes but does not specify a concrete benefit.
The layout has competing elements and lacks clear spacing.
The product is visible, but material quality is not emphasized.
There are no visible trust signals in the image.
The image is mostly readable, but some elements may blend together.
The image resembles a generic product listing rather than a campaign.
